div.style: margin-bottom: 15px; display: flex; gap: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap;

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; color: #4CAF50;

div.label: ✅ Search Target Area

input.placeholder: Enter city/area to target (e.g., Abu Dhabi, Dubai)

button.style: background-color: #4CAF50; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: bold;

div.small: Search for cities or areas you want to target

label.style: display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; color: #f44336;

div.label: 🚫 Search Exclusion Area

input.placeholder: Enter area to exclude (e.g., specific district)

button.style: background-color: #f44336; color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 20px; font-weight: bold;

div.small: Search for specific areas to exclude from targeting

div.style: background: #e3f2fd; border-left: 4px solid #2196F3; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 4px;

ul.li: Green zones = Areas where you WANT to show ads
Red zones = Areas you want to EXCLUDE (like Google Ads)
Search for a city/area and click the result to select its boundary
You can also manually draw zones using the tools on the map

div.style: width: 100%; height: 600px; border: 2px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
margin-top: 15px; display: flex; gap: 20px; justify-content: center; padding: 10px; background: #f5f5f5; border-radius: 4px;
width: 30px; height: 20px; background: #4CAF50; opacity: 0.5; border: 2px solid #4CAF50;
width: 30px; height: 20px; background: #f44336; opacity: 0.5; border: 2px solid #f44336;
